title: Bring back the ability to export from the "Search Everything"
excerpt: My company used the “Search Everything” feature to run a weekly report which gathers information from over 50 boards. We search by a specific hashtag and export the list. It appears that Monday has gotten rid of the opti…

posts.author: meganmansfield (Megan Mansfield)
posts.cookedHtml:
My company used the “Search Everything” feature to run a weekly report which gathers information from over 50 boards. We search by a specific hashtag and export the list. It appears that Monday has gotten rid of the option to export to excel from the “Search Everything” area. We need this feature restored ASAP!
It is not feasible to export a list from 50 individual boards.
